{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220654135CB58EDF7DFE488F10E5"}"},"total":1186},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512077249591378750","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺好玩的指的不是剧情，就是虽然是看书，但总感觉主角在我耳边叽叽喳喳[思考]这就是作者的写作特点嘛，就感觉是有个话痨朋友跟你吐槽"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749048196,"group_id":"7496828431657602072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6oH/wyXLDctkJ/DTa6T2fdEbvNK1ZKMfRz4sxfrHTq3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/363b2728b909458fb19b7e878f8ea6f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708820&x-signature=%2Beqzg0wmPYwCDp%2F708fmbfKdBHQ%3D","user_id":"4438086351074995","user_name":"与竖子讲逻辑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4438086351074995","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7496828431657602072","book_info":{"abstract":"【雾雾果实能力者】【罗杰海贼团元老级别】【参加神之谷】【是男人就应该玩大剑】【人物都配图评论区】【雾可能会汲取生命哦】【不舔路飞，尾田老贼塑造的人物，就算是反派也是相当有魅力】【单女主】【复活罗杰】【罗杰养我，真是你的福气，我传奇幼师王，香克斯巴基我养的，艾斯我养的，乌塔我养的…小鬼们的敬佩的大哥都是我，未来掌控大海万人拥护的雾主皇帝】
"希望是草帽团...希望是草帽团..."他双手合十祈祷着，突然意识到什么，"等等，如果是黑胡子团怎么办？现在连时间线都不清楚，不行再看看。如果分辨不出来的话，我就跑。"
船只渐渐靠近，瑞特眯起眼睛。船头站着个戴草帽的年轻人。距离太远看不清脸，但那顶草帽...
"路飞！是路飞！"瑞特激动得手舞足蹈，"我就知道河神不会那么坑！"
瑞特看见草帽实在是太激动了，
当小船靠岸时，瑞特一个箭步冲上前："路飞！索隆！我想死你们了！"
戴草帽的年轻人一脸懵逼："谁是路飞？"
金发男子推了推眼镜："我叫雷利，他是罗杰。"
咱漫长旅途中，瑞特好像根本就没有变化，依旧玉树临风，英俊潇洒
在顶上战争时候，血雾笼罩马林梵多，雾中出现一双血红色的眼睛，“你们要对我可爱的侄子做什么","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e60ae108590379294271e5bbea69896c","author":"想要明天放假","author_id":"","book_id":"7496828431657602072","book_name":"说好跟罗杰躺赢，船上就三人咋躺","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8d0b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7496828574884708888","read_count":"28192","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1187215"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"552","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,海贼,单女主,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0c6ca4da631b5ae2c455c8e757d3ac82~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317654&x-signature=PunfowB45JxMKqsqBJg1AnQ8Dos%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1236307937606509","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220654135CB58EDF7DFE488F10E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10063},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1749132364,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7524703463352894232","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体来说还是不错的，对于喜欢慢节奏的人来说可能这本书的节奏稍快一点，可能对于人物和细节的描写略微粗糙，但是感情描写是挺好的，确实可以很好的牵动读者的感情。
还有就是作者挺有梗的，看着看着总能莫名其妙的笑一下[思考]大体来看，整本书还是相当不错的，值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751984297,"group_id":"7496828431657602072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6aaTWwEp+FxeMsOLTCAh+A=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69c8c7886e4148b9a6b9bbf25a37cfbe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704142&x-signature=jVr0Ugd0cAiC9W5h%2BqFH4ypvhvE%3D","user_id":"101525660384","user_name":"一只小红鸟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101525660384","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7496828431657602072","book_info":{"abstract":"【雾雾果实能力者】【罗杰海贼团元老级别】【参加神之谷】【是男人就应该玩大剑】【人物都配图评论区】【雾可能会汲取生命哦】【不舔路飞，尾田老贼塑造的人物，就算是反派也是相当有魅力】【单女主】【复活罗杰】【罗杰养我，真是你的福气，我传奇幼师王，香克斯巴基我养的，艾斯我养的，乌塔我养的…小鬼们的敬佩的大哥都是我，未来掌控大海万人拥护的雾主皇帝】
